Metadata.title: PythonKids — Learn to code in Python!
Metadata.description: The fun and progressive way to learn Python, for ages 8 to 18.
Metadata.keywords: Python, learn Python, coding for kids, programming, educational game

Home.hero_desc: Short lessons, fun challenges, and projects you'll be proud of. Join thousands of kids learning to code! 🚀
Home.section_journey_desc: Progress at your own pace, level by level
Home.duel_desc: Challenge a friend in real time!
Home.challenges_section_desc: Solve coding challenges, test your logic and earn badges!
Home.footer_tagline: 🐍 PythonKids — Learning to code is awesome! 🚀

GlobalUI.streak_continue: {streak} days in a row! Keep going!

ChallengeEditor.keyboard_hint: Ctrl+Enter to test • Tab to indent

AdventureMap.completion_message: Congratulations, you're a Grand Master Python!

HomeProgressWidget.label: 📊 Total progress
HomeProgressWidget.completion: 🌟 Complete course — you're a Python Master!

HomeCoffresWidget.open_hint: Open them on your profile to discover your rewards →

HomeOnlineWidget.none_active: No active players right now — be the first! 👋
HomeOnlineWidget.alone: You're the only active player right now 👋

StreakBanner.danger_desc: Do a lesson today so you don't lose everything!
StreakBanner.legendary_100_desc: 100 days in a row — you're a true Python Master!
StreakBanner.two_weeks_desc: Consistency is the key to success!
StreakBanner.one_week_desc: 7 days in a row — you're killing it!
StreakBanner.on_fire_desc: {streak} days in a row — keep it up!
StreakBanner.started_desc: You've started your streak — don't stop!

OnboardingTour.step1_desc: Learn Python step by step with short lessons, fun challenges and badges to unlock. Let's go!
OnboardingTour.step2_desc: From Beginner level (age 8) to Python Master. Each level gives you a badge and a chest of rewards!
OnboardingTour.step3_desc: By learning, you earn XP to level up in the Battle Pass! Each level: gems 💎, chests or exclusive items to claim.
OnboardingTour.step4_desc: Daily and weekly quests await you on the home page. Complete challenges to earn gems 💎 and badges!
OnboardingTour.step5_desc: Your progress is automatically saved. Come back every day to maintain your consecutive days streak and earn bonuses!

BadgeDisplay.title: 🏅 My badges
BadgeDisplay.click_hint: Click on a badge to see how to get it

FeedbackButton.message_placeholder: What you think of the site, an idea, a bug...
FeedbackButton.error: An error occurred, please try again.

PushNotificationSetup.title: 🔔 Enable streak reminders!
PushNotificationSetup.desc: Get a notification if you forget your daily lesson.

Challenges.title: Python Challenges 🎯
Challenges.subtitle: Solve challenges, earn points, unlock badges!
Challenges.no_more: All challenges at this level are completed!
Challenges.unlocked_message: Unlock level {level} ({name}) to access this challenge.

Shop.title: 🛒 Shop
Shop.subtitle: Spend your gems to customize your avatar!
Shop.skins_desc: Skins change the background color of your avatar. You can equip only one at a time.
Shop.titles_desc: Titles appear below your username on your profile. You can equip only one at a time.
Shop.stickers_desc: Stickers appear on your profile. You can equip up to 3 at the same time.
Shop.consumables_desc: Consumables are used automatically at the right time. Buy multiple to build up a stock!
Shop.streak_freeze_desc: Protects your streak if you miss a day. Used automatically the next day.
Shop.themes_desc: Themes change the background colors throughout the interface. Buy them once, use them forever!
Shop.gems_desc: Refill your gem balance to unlock exclusive skins, stickers, and themes!
Shop.promo_desc: Have a gift code? Enter it here to receive your gems.
Shop.promo_ok: ✓ Code validated! Gems added to your balance.
Shop.promo_ok_skin: 🐍 Secret skin unlocked: {name}! Go equip it in the Skins tab.
Shop.promo_used: ⚠️ This code has already been used on this device.
Shop.payment_secure: Secure payment via PayPal · Gems are credited instantly
Shop.gems_hint: 💎 Earn gems by opening chests in the daily series or completing levels!

Leaderboard.title: Hall of Fame 🏆
Leaderboard.subtitle: The best coders in PythonKids!
Leaderboard.no_entries: No one is in the leaderboard yet. Be the first!
Leaderboard.no_entries_period: No one has played {period} yet. Be the first!

BattlePass.title: Battle Pass
BattlePass.subtitle: Earn XP by learning and unlock exclusive rewards!

Editor.title: Your Python Sandbox 🧪
Editor.subtitle: Write any Python code and execute it directly in your browser!
Editor.saved_note: 💾 Your code is automatically saved in the browser

Duel.title: Duel Mode
Duel.subtitle: Face a friend in real time on the same Python challenge!
Duel.error_no_username: You need a username to play duels!
Duel.step_1: Create a duel and share the code with your friend
Duel.step_2: Your friend joins with the code
Duel.step_3: You code the solution to the same challenge at the same time
Duel.step_4: First to pass the tests wins! 🏆

Pet.title: 🤖 My Robot
Pet.subtitle: Control it with Python — variables, loops and functions come to life in real time!
Pet.ready: ✅ Python ready — feed() play() sleep() dance() status() are available
Pet.shop_note: 💡 Skins purchased in the <link>shop</link> change your robot's aura

Certificate.requirement: You must complete at least 5 levels to earn your certificate. Keep learning!
Certificate.share_text: 🎓 {username} just earned their PythonKids certificate! They've mastered Python fundamentals. #PythonKids #Code
Certificate.description: has successfully completed PythonKids levels and mastered the fundamentals of Python programming, including variables, conditionals, loops, functions, and object-oriented programming.

Quiz.title: 📚 Revision Quiz
Quiz.subtitle: Review lessons you've completed and earn gems!
Quiz.no_quizzes_desc: Complete lessons to unlock their quizzes!

Friends.title: My friends 👥
Friends.subtitle: Your friends on other devices
Friends.need_username: Create a username to access friends.
Friends.error_exists: This friend is already in your list!
Friends.no_friends: No friends yet. Add a friend's username!
Friends.no_activity: No recent activity from your friends.
Friends.duel_modal_subtitle: Create a duel, then share the code with your friend

Mistakes.title: My failed challenges
Mistakes.subtitle: Challenges you've tried but not yet completed. Try them now!
Mistakes.none_desc: You have no unresolved failed challenges. Keep it up!

Avatars.title: Your player skins
Avatars.subtitle: Each level unlocks a stylier avatar. It's up to you to progress ✨
Avatars.hint: Complete lessons and challenges to earn XP and level up.

Projects.label: 🛠️ Guided projects
Projects.title: Build something real!
Projects.subtitle: One project per level — step by step, you build a real program.

Parent.share_tooltip: Send this link to another device to view progress.
Parent.time_estimate: Estimate based on {lessons} lesson{s} and {challenges} challenge{s} completed
Parent.hard_challenges_desc: These challenges required multiple attempts — it may be useful to revisit these concepts.
Parent.bp_premium_price: The Premium Pass (€4.99) unlocks additional exclusive rewards.
Parent.tip_1: Each lesson takes about 10 minutes — ideal for a short daily session
Parent.tip_2: The streak encourages consistency: even 1 lesson per day makes a big difference
Parent.tip_3: Challenges (🎯) can be attempted at any time to review and earn badges
Parent.tip_4: Progress is saved in the browser — avoid clearing the cache
Parent.backup_desc: Back up all progress to a file to avoid losing it if the browser cache is cleared.

LevelPage.title: Level {id}: {name}
LevelPage.lesson_start_hint: Click on a lesson to start!
LevelPage.all_done: You've completed all PythonKids levels — you're a true Python Master!

NotFound.title: Page not found!
NotFound.message: The Python snake looked everywhere for this page… but it doesn't exist! Maybe you got lost in an infinite loop? 🤔
